publishedAbstract: The ocs-metrics-exporter pod frequently reports Readiness Probe error. Examples: ~~~ Mar 19 12:34:52 worker2.ocp-debug.ccn.com kubenswrapper[5445]: I0319 12:34:52.555945 5445 prober.go:107] "Probe failed" probeType="Readiness" pod="openshift-storage/ocs-metrics-exporter-cd596f9db-xwx94" podUID="a437030d-570a-4990-82f2-5f39fe114ab9" containerName="ocs-metrics-exporter" probeResult="failure" output="Get \"http://110.131.xx.25:8080/metrics\": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)" Mar 19 12:35:02 worker2.ocp-debug.ccn.com kubenswrapper[5445]: I0319 12:35:02.554901 5445 prober.go:107] "Probe failed" probeType="Readiness" pod="openshift-storage/ocs-metrics-exporter-cd596f9db-xwx94" podUID="a437030d-570a-4990-82f2-5f39fe114ab9" containerName="ocs-metrics-exporter" probeResult="failure" output="Get \"http://110.131.xx.25:8080/metrics\": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)" Mar 19 12:37:12 worker2.ocp-debug.ccn.com kubenswrapper[5445]: I0319 12:37:12.555718 5445 prober.go:107] "Probe failed" probeType="Readiness" pod="openshift-storage/ocs-metrics-exporter-cd596f9db-xwx94" podUID="a437030d-570a-4990-82f2-5f39fe114ab9" containerName="ocs-metrics-exporter" probeResult="failure" output="Get \"http://110.131.xx.25:8080/metrics\": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)" Mar 19 12:37:22 worker2.ocp-debug.ccn.com kubenswrapper[5445]: I0319 12:37:22.554888 5445 prober.go:107] "Probe failed" probeType="Readiness" pod="openshift-storage/ocs-metrics-exporter-cd596f9db-xwx94" podUID="a437030d-570a-4990-82f2-5f39fe114ab9" containerName="ocs-metrics-exporter" probeResult="failure" output="Get \"http://110.131.xx.25:8080/metrics\": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)" ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF:  The ocs-metrics-exporter pod frequently reports Readiness Probe error.
